name: DinoBob
blurb: Rebuilt twice mid-season — fitting, for a game called REBUILT — and still reached the World Championship, with the Excellence in Engineering Award en route.
alt: DinoBob on the field at a 2026 REBUILT event

name: C-Horse
blurb: REEFSCAPE District Championship win with a team that was 100% students of color — plus a Centennial event win and the Autonomous Award.

name: Scorpius
blurb: 3rd place at the CRESCENDO District Championship — two Autonomous Awards and a trip to the World Championship.

name: District Champions
blurb: Our first District Championship — three CHARGED UP event wins and the #2 rank in FIRST Mid-Atlantic.
alt: The 2023 robot carrying a cone during a CHARGED UP match
